Public Attributes | List of all members
BearWare.MediaFilePlayback Struct Reference
Stream Media Files

Properties for initializing or updating a file for media streaming. More...

Public Attributes

uint uOffsetMSec
 Offset in milliseconds in the media file where to start playback. Pass BearWare.TeamTalkBase.TT_MEDIAPLAYBACK_OFFSET_IGNORE to ignore this value when using TeamTalkBase.UpdateLocalPlayback() or TeamTalkBase.UpdateStreamingMediaFileToChannel(). uOffsetMSec must be less than uDurationMSec in BearWare.MediaFileInfo.
 
bool bPaused
 Start or pause media file playback.
 
AudioPreprocessor audioPreprocessor
 Option to activate audio preprocessor on local media file playback.
 

Detailed Description

Properties for initializing or updating a file for media streaming.

See also
TeamTalkBase.InitLocalPlayback()
TeamTalkBase.UpdateLocalPlayback()
TeamTalkBase.StartStreamingMediaFileToChannel()
TeamTalkBase.UpdateStreamingMediaFileToChannel()

Definition at line 1646 of file TeamTalk.cs.

Member Data Documentation

◆ uOffsetMSec

uint BearWare.MediaFilePlayback.uOffsetMSec

Offset in milliseconds in the media file where to start playback. Pass BearWare.TeamTalkBase.TT_MEDIAPLAYBACK_OFFSET_IGNORE to ignore this value when using TeamTalkBase.UpdateLocalPlayback() or TeamTalkBase.UpdateStreamingMediaFileToChannel(). uOffsetMSec must be less than uDurationMSec in BearWare.MediaFileInfo.

Definition at line 1652 of file TeamTalk.cs.

Start or pause media file playback.

Option to activate audio preprocessor on local media file playback.
